title: coelogyne clemensii var. longiscapa
intro: Coelogyne clemensii var. longiscapa is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its unique white and yellow flowers. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani practices, due to its potential medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne clemensii var. longiscapa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
